cenas.dalle_prompt: A person is holding a high-value treat near the dog's nose. The dog is standing and focused on the treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, establishing the starting position and the dog's intense focus on the lure.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person slowly moves the treat in a horizontal circle around the dog's head, luring it to follow. The dog starts to turn its body to keep its nose on the treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera follows the treat's circular path, showing how it guides the dog's movement.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog completes a full 360-degree spin, following the treat. The moment it completes the circle, the person says 'Sim!' and gives the treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A top-down shot that captures the full spin, with a celebratory graphic appearing as the dog completes the circle.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The person now makes the same circular motion with an empty hand, saying 'Gira'. The dog performs the full spin without the treat lure. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera focuses on the hand signal, then on the dog performing the spin flawlessly. A 'Jackpot!' animation celebrates the success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog performing a spin in slow-motion, looking like a graceful dancer. Text overlay: 'Gira: O Giro da Alegria'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A beautiful, cinematic slow-motion shot of the spin, with motion blur and artistic lighting. The text appears in a flowing, elegant script font.
